# services.autofs

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.autofs`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.autofs.autoMaster` | `string` | Contents of `/etc/auto.master` file. See {manpage}`auto.master(5)` and {manpage}`autofs(5)`. |
| `services.autofs.debug` | `boolean` | Pass -d and -7 to automount and write log to the system journal. |
| `services.autofs.enable` | `boolean` | Mount filesystems on demand. Unmount them automatically. You may also be interested in afuse. |
| `services.autofs.timeout` | `signed integer` | Set the global minimum timeout, in seconds, until directories are unmounted |
